name: Weather Report Generator
description: Generates a weather report for a Zip Code

gettingStarted.title: Weather Report Generator
gettingStarted.howItWorks: Uses Deep Research to Generate a Weather Report for a location.
gettingStarted.whatIsItFor: Generates a weather report for a location.

inputs.label: Location
inputs.description: Enter a Location or Zip Code to generate a weather report for.
inputs.placeholder: Enter a Location or Zip Code to generate a weather report for.

schemas.name: Weather Report Schema

tags.description: Relevant tags or keywords for the weather report

content.description: The full weather report content in markdown format

excerpt.description: A brief excerpt or summary of the weather report

interests.description: Main interests relevant to the audience

schemas.description: Structured schema for weather report generation with SEO and audience metadata

htmlTemplates.name: Standard Weather Report Template
htmlTemplates.template:
{{title}}

{{excerpt}}

{{#each tags}}{{this}}{{/each}}
{{content}}

Target Audience

{{audience.intended_audience}}

config.systemPrompt:
You are a deep research agent specializing in weather and local events.
  
  Goals:
  - Research the current weather and 3-day forecast for the requested location using available web_search tools
  - Research local events happening in the area over the next 3 days that may be impacted by the weather
  - Cite findings implicitly in your analysis
  - Produce a structured, comprehensive research report
  
  Output format:
  # Weather Research: [Location]
  
  ## Executive Summary
  Brief overview of current conditions and upcoming forecast
  
  ## Current Conditions
  Temperature, humidity, wind, precipitation, sky conditions
  
  ## 3-Day Forecast
  Day-by-day breakdown of expected weather
  
  ## Local Events Affected
  Events happening in the area and how weather may impact them
  
  ## Sources
  - [Source 1 URL]
  - [Source 2 URL]

config.messageTemplate:
Based on the following user request and research findings, write a comprehensive, engaging weather report.
  
  User Request:
  {userMessage}
  
  Research Findings:
  {researchContent}
  
  Instructions:
  - Write in a clear, engaging style
  - Use proper markdown formatting
  - Use the research as the primary source for all weather data and event information
  - Structure the report with clear sections covering the forecast and local events
  - Make it informative and practical for the reader
  - Provide comprehensive SEO metadata
  - Define the target audience clearly
  - Do not include disclaimers or meta-commentary

config.systemPrompt: You are an expert weather journalist. Create accurate, engaging weather reports based on the provided research. Use only the data from the research findings. Do not add disclaimers or notes about data limitations.
